data.body: Plan-review PASS (signed, --ref HEAD so code-grounding sees arcticduck's committed helper) on iteration 5. Key correction driven by the review: empirically verified Agent(tool_timeout=) CANCELS async tools (~0.3s) but is a NO-OP for sync in-process tools (async cancel can't stop a blocking call) — rebar's tools are sync, so tool_timeout bounds MCP/async tools; sync ones bounded by derived step caps. Also deduplicated: read timeout reuses cfg.timeout_s (no new key), authoritative on anthropic path (our client) vs model_settings['timeout'] for other providers. Implemented + committed 2b72bf60a. LLMConfig.llm_tool_timeout_s(120); httpx.Timeout via arcticduck http_timeout seam; ADR 0038 (idle-watchdog deferred). 8 timeout tests + 178 affected green; lint+typecheck clean. Not closing until Verified +1. NOTE: children after arcticduck must be reviewed with --ref HEAD (default origin/main doesn't include committed stack code).
